title: alnus incana var. pinnata
intro: Alnus incana var. pinnata, also known as the narrowleaf green alder, is a variety of the green alder tree (Alnus incana) that is native to Northern Europe and Asia. This tree has medicinal properties, including its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, and is used to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The health benefits of Alnus incana var. pinnata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
